name: Central Pattana Public Company Limited
summary: Central Pattana Public Company Limited develops and manages real estate properties primarily in Thailand. It develops and rents shopping centers, office buildings, condominiums, hotels, and residential buildings; offers property management consulting and corporate services; invests in real estates and leasehold property fund; and sells land and houses, and condominium units. The company also operates play land and water theme park, and hotels; manages real estate investment trust, condominium juristic person, and housing estate juristic person; and provides utility, food center, training, and personnel development services. As of December 31, 2020, its property portfolio comprised 34 shopping centers, 10 office buildings, 2 hotels, and 1 rental residential project. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
